Blu | Com 6

Jones AV, a Medical AV Company asked me to create a Powerpoint Presentation to promote a newly invented Medical Device which allows doctors to communicate in operating theatres while using PPE, which was critical during the recent Covid-19 pandemic. Thirty pages designed in total with 'dark mode' UX / UI styling to match the overall branding of the company and it's products.

blucom6.com
Year

2019

Work
Deliverables

1 Slidedeck
